meta_title: For Founders: Antigravity project template to Solve no portfolio (Advanced Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no portfolio. A Advanced-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Antigravity Project Template to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Overcome the 'no portfolio' trap. Use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to launch high-conversion SaaS MVPs in record time.
content.answer_block: The 'no portfolio' trap kills momentum. Bypass this by leveraging the Antigravity project template to generate high-fidelity, production-ready SaaS MVPs. By integrating Claude Code, you transform abstract ideas into revenue-generating assets, effectively demonstrating technical authority and business viability to potential clients and investors in days, not months.
content.intro:
The cold reality of the SaaS market is that clients don't buy code; they buy outcomes. If you lack a portfolio, you are invisible in a saturated marketplace. You have the vision, but your empty GitHub profile is a barrier to entry that keeps you stuck in the ideation phase while competitors capture your market share.

The Antigravity project template changes the physics of development. It serves as your structural foundation, eliminating the 'blank page' syndrome and allowing you to deploy sophisticated, architecture-grade SaaS applications instantly. By combining this with Claude Code, you aren't just writing code—you are orchestrating an automated pipeline that turns high-level business logic into market-ready software.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Foundation
steps.description: Establish a production-ready repository structure. This ensures your MVP adheres to enterprise patterns from the first commit, signaling professionalism.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new SaaS project using the Antigravity template with support for Next.js 14, Supabase Auth, and Stripe billing integration.

steps.title: Define Core Business Logic
steps.description: Translate your specific niche problem into a data model. Focus on the 'Value Prop' feature that justifies a subscription fee.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a database schema for a subscription-based AI content repurposing tool, including tables for 'Projects', 'Outputs', and 'UsageLogs'.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'apply schema changes and generate Prisma client'

steps.title: Build High-Velocity UI Components
steps.description: Utilize the template's component library to build a dashboard that feels expensive and intuitive.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a responsive dashboard layout using Tailwind CSS that displays project statistics and a 'New Project' call-to-action button.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create dashboard UI components based on antigravity-ui styles'

steps.title: Implement Monetization Logic
steps.description: Connect the stripe-webhook handler to your subscription status to gate features. Revenue validation is the ultimate portfolio piece.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Integrate Stripe checkout flow to handle monthly and annual billing tiers within the existing Antigravity auth structure.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'setup stripe-webhook and subscription-guard middleware'

steps.title: Deploy to Production
steps.description: Go live. An 'in-production' link is worth ten 'coming soon' repositories. This proves you can ship.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure Vercel deployment settings and environment variables for the production environment.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'deploy to production and verify health check endpoints'

pro_tips: Treat your MVP as a 'Productized Service' rather than just a tool; investors value the business model as much as the code.
Use Claude Code to write automated unit tests for your checkout flow; showing test coverage on your portfolio is a massive trust-signal.
Focus on one 'hero' feature that solves a painful bottleneck; a single powerful tool beats a bloated, unfinished suite every time.
Leverage the Antigravity template's built-in logging to track user behavior, then present this data as 'market validation' to potential clients.
Never ship a 'demo'—always ship a 'public beta' with a clear roadmap to keep your users engaged and your momentum high.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is live, focus on acquiring your first five paying users. Use the feedback loop to iterate the product and document the journey to build your 'Proof of Work' portfolio.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting the lack of a portfolio hold your vision hostage. By using the Antigravity template, you gain the technical leverage to build, ship, and scale products that prove your expertise through tangible results. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
